title: Diccora Dogium.
content:
Dickory dickory dock,
	 The mouse ran up the clock,
	 The clock struck one,
	 The mouse ran down,
	 Dickory dickory dock.

	    Diccora diccora dogium,
	    Ascendit mus horologium.
	        Insonuit hora,
	        Fugit mus sine mor�,
	    Diccora diccora dogium.
meaning:
Jacob Bigelow's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Diccora Dogium."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
